questions: What is the company's remote work policy?
How many vacation days do employees get?
What is the process for requesting time off?
Are there any blackout dates for vacation?
What happens to unused vacation days?

knowledge_base.content: Company Remote Work Policy: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week. Managers must approve remote work schedules in advance.
Vacation Policy: Full-time employees receive 15 vacation days per year. Part-time employees receive pro-rated vacation based on hours worked.
Time Off Requests: Submit requests through the HR portal at least 2 weeks in advance. Manager approval required within 3 business days.
Blackout Dates: Vacation requests during Q4 (Oct-Dec) require director-level approval due to high business volume. No complete team vacations during this period.
Vacation Rollover: Up to 5 unused vacation days may roll over to the next year. Days beyond 5 are forfeited. Rollover days must be used within Q1.
